esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// capacity_available / capacity < 0.1 means < 10% free; adjust threshold as needed
| WHERE metrics.capacity IS NOT NULL AND metrics.capacity > 0
  AND metrics.capacity_available IS NOT NULL
| EVAL pct_available = metrics.capacity_available / metrics.capacity
| WHERE pct_available < 0.1
| STATS pct_available = MIN(pct_available), capacity_available = MIN(metrics.capacity_available)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id, attributes.store
| SORT pct_available ASC
